cmk.buildCmkFrontend.name: Build cmk-frontend
cmk.buildCmkFrontend.command: bazel build //packages/cmk-frontend:dist && rm -rf packages/cmk-frontend/dist && ln -sfn $(bazel info bazel-bin)/packages/cmk-frontend/dist packages/cmk-frontend/dist

cmk.buildVitestDeps.name: Build Vitest dependencies & Refresh Vitests
cmk.buildVitestDeps.command: bazel build //packages/cmk-shared-typing:cmk_shared_typing_ts //packages/cmk-frontend:dist && ln -sfn $(bazel info bazel-bin)/packages/cmk-shared-typing packages/cmk-frontend-vue/node_modules/cmk-shared-typing && rm -rf packages/cmk-frontend/dist && ln -sfn $(bazel info bazel-bin)/packages/cmk-frontend/dist packages/cmk-frontend/dist
